WOW.no-wow-subtitle: Create your first WOW to get started.
WOW.fight-beschreibung: For time: Complete the given repetitions as fast as possible.
WOW.amrap-beschreibung: AMRAP: As many reps as possible in the given time.
WOW.circuit-beschreibung: Circuit training with configurable rounds and work/rest times.
WOW.tabata-beschreibung: Tabata: 8 rounds with 20s work and 10s rest.
WOW.emom-beschreibung: EMOM: Every minute on the minute complete the target reps, rest the remainder.
WOW.hold-beschreibung: Hold the selected exercise as a static hold for as long as possible.
WOW.runchallenge-beschreibung: Run challenge: Students collect distances and compare in a class ranking.
WOW.amrap: AMRAP (maximum number of repetitions in the given time)
WOW.tabata: Tabata (8 rounds with 20s load and 10s recovery)
WOW.bereiche: areas for the integration of the students (they will receive badges according to their area)
WOW.free-beschreibung: Free description, link to a file, ...

SportABZEICHEN.info-titel: Info about the German Sport Badge
SportABZEICHEN.info1: The German Sports Badge is a decoration of the Federal Republic of Germany with order character (Federal Law Gazette Part I, 1958, p. 422); it may only be worn if it has been properly awarded and the person awarded holds a certificate of bestowal or a certificate of possession (§ 8 of the Order Law).
SportABZEICHEN.info2: The individually provided services in the individual disciplines are assigned to the three service levels on the basis of the service catalog. Depending on the assignment to one of the three service levels, a point value results for each service and discipline group:
SportABZEICHEN.info3: In order to acquire the German Sports Badge, four performances (one discipline per discipline group) must be achieved at least in bronze (1 point = 4 points each). The achieved points are added up and the total points value results in the award in bronze, silver or gold:
SportABZEICHEN.schwimmfertigkeit: The proof of the swimming ability is necessary condition for the acquisition of the German Sports Badge.

BUNDESJUGENDSPIELE.info1: Each student competes in four disciplines at the Federal Youth Games and receives points for their performance.
BUNDESJUGENDSPIELE.info2: These points are added up to a total score, which then leads to a participation, winner or even honorary certificate.

REGISTER.subtitle: Create your free account
REGISTER.password-minlength: Password must be at least 6 characters
REGISTER.must-accept: Please confirm Terms and Privacy Policy

STUDENTS.smart-paste-desc: Paste a list of names here (e.g. from Excel or Word). We try to automatically separate first and last names.
STUDENTS.smart-paste-preview-info: Please check the recognized names. You can correct them here.
STUDENTS.voice-input-desc: Dictate names one by one. Say 'New Line' or pause briefly between names.
STUDENTS.photo-scan-desc: Take a photo of a name list. The app tries to automatically recognize the names.
STUDENTS.wait_for_teacher: Please wait for your teacher to accept you.
STUDENTS.self_registration_desc: Let your students register themselves by scanning a QR code.
STUDENTS.scan_instruction: Scan this QR code or go to Sport.de/student-register

SCHUELER.name: First name
SCHUELER.geburt-hinweis: Required for table grading by age (Cooper and Shuttle Run up to upper grades).
